## Summary

What does this pull request change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `clarinet check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behaviour changes
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific you want feedback on.
